mapper.sql: id, elder_id, content, estimated_amount, actual_amount, remark, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
select
from purchase_request order by created_at desc

select
from purchase_request where elder_id = #{elderId,jdbcType=BIGINT} order by created_at desc

select
from purchase_request where status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by created_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into purchase_request (elder_id, content, estimated_amount, actual_amount, remark, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{elderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{estimatedAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{actualAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
